title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Hyundai India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Hyundai India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Hyundai India in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hyundai India:
Hyundai India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyundai India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
